name: Cross Hesitation after Open Impetus Turn
preceding_figure_names: Back Lock, Drag Hesitation, Left Whisk, Natural Turn, Progressive Chasse To R, Reverse Corte
following_figure_names: Chasse From Promenade Position, Weave From Promenade Position, Cross Hesitation, Wing, Left Whisk
notes:
Different from leading Wing, in which, Man allows upper body to do extra rotation to allow Lady to pass from one side of body to another.
In this Cross Hesitation, Man's arms remain on his right side, you want Lady to stay in your right front.
Extension: shoulder and chest - "rotate up" feel like high jump. Head: do not break the neck.

comments: This is "Open Impetus". Main the sway from previous Natural Turn and transition into PP.

steps.action: Diagonal forward in PP, L side leading
comments: Think about a diagonal line to come out in PP.
Big step. Depending on Man's lead, may have big swooping action here.
Allow feet to turn, delay head.
Step should be adequately large in order to keep balance, keep extending left side, then lift left side to turn head to the right at end of 2

steps.action: To side in PP having brushed to LF
comments: Extension: shoulder and chest - "rotate up" feel like high jump. Head: do not break the neck.
